hero.title: African geomatics
hero.titleAccent: at the heart of the future
hero.subtitle: Uniting talents, accelerating research, and deploying geospatial technologies for the sovereign and sustainable development of Africa.

expertise.sectionDesc: Cutting-edge technologies applied to African realities for informed territorial development.

items.title: Mapping & GIS
items.description: Advanced geographic information systems for precise mapping and territorial decision support.

items.title: Satellite Remote Sensing
items.description: Monitoring and analysis of the environment and land use through space technologies.

items.title: Forest Monitoring
items.description: Decision support for sustainable management and protection of African forest ecosystems.

items.title: Climate Surveillance
items.description: Territorial governance and decision support facing drought risks and climate change.

items.title: Flood Management
items.description: Decision support and risk prevention for territorial management facing floods.

items.title: Smart Agriculture
items.description: Digital solutions for sustainable and optimized agriculture through satellite data.

about.title: A pan-African network dedicated to geomatics
about.p1: REAAGESS (Réseau Africain des Acteurs de la Géomatique et des Sciences Spatiales) is a pan-African initiative dedicated to promoting spatial sciences and geomatics in Africa.
about.p2: We unite young professionals, researchers and enthusiasts in the geospatial field to foster collaboration, knowledge sharing and innovation at the continental scale.
about.p3: Our activities include training sector players, publishing research work, and developing innovative projects in geomatics and spatial sciences.
about.visionText: To place spatial technologies and geospatial intelligence at the service of sustainable development, territorial governance and scientific excellence in Africa.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be a pan-African reference network in spatial sciences and geomatics, capable of uniting talents and contributing to the sustainable and sovereign development of Africa through geospatial technologies.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To unite young Africans in spatial sciences and geomatics, promote innovation, stimulate research, train in geospatial intelligence and support major African projects in space engineering.

whyJoin.title: Be part of the African geospatial movement
whyJoin.subtitle: Discover the exclusive benefits of the REAAGESS network

items.title: Data access
items.description: Each member benefits from access to geospatial data mobilized by the network for their projects and research.

items.title: Thematic hubs
items.description: Be part of a hub dedicated to your specialty and collaborate with domain experts.

items.title: Skills exchange
items.description: Participate in training courses, webinars and workshops to enrich your knowledge.

items.title: Annual meetings
items.description: Attend in-person activities in each member country, on a rotating basis.

items.title: In-depth discussions
items.description: Contribute to rigorous exchanges on geospatial intelligence and innovative technologies.

items.title: African collaboration
items.description: Work with enthusiasts and experts at the continental scale to stimulate innovation.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to join the network?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Join hundreds of African professionals advancing geomatics across the continent.
